attributes.action: Negotiate with the EU re. the use of a valid EU Pet Passport for EU entry.
attributes.background: The UK Government should negotiate a reciprocal arrangement with the EU, OR prevent entry to the UK with an EU Pet Passport.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Seek agreement with the EU to accept pet passports for UK-EU travel" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767906
